test_patch:
diff --git a/test/internal/config/load_context_obstructed_test.go b/test/internal/config/load_context_obstructed_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..c8c98406
--- /dev/null
+++ b/test/internal/config/load_context_obstructed_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,223 @@
+package config_test
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"fmt"
+	"net/url"
+	"reflect"
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+
+	config "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/config"
+	"gocloud.dev/blob"
+	"gocloud.dev/blob/memblob"
+
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+)
+
+type typedNilContext struct{}
+
+func (*typedNilContext) Deadline() (time.Time, bool) {
+	panic("typed-nil context must be normalized before use")
+}
+func (*typedNilContext) Done() <-chan struct{} {
+	panic("typed-nil context must be normalized before use")
+}
+func (*typedNilContext) Err() error {
+	panic("typed-nil context must be normalized before use")
+}
+func (*typedNilContext) Value(any) any {
+	panic("typed-nil context must be normalized before use")
+}
+
+type mockURLOpener struct {
+	bucket *blob.Bucket
+	onOpen func(context.Context)
+}
+
+func (c *mockURLOpener) OpenBucketURL(ctx context.Context, u *url.URL) (*blob.Bucket, error) {
+	if c.onOpen != nil {
+		c.onOpen(ctx)
+	}
+
+	for param := range u.Query() {
+		return nil, fmt.Errorf("open bucket %v: invalid query parameter %q", u, param)
+	}
+
+	return c.bucket, nil
+}
+
+func isNilLikeContext(ctx context.Context) bool {
+	if ctx == nil {
+		return true
+	}
+	v := reflect.ValueOf(ctx)
+	switch v.Kind() {
+	case reflect.Chan, reflect.Func, reflect.Interface, reflect.Map, reflect.Pointer, reflect.Slice:
+		return v.IsNil()
+	default:
+		return false
+	}
+}
+
+func TestLoadMaintainsBackwardCompatibleEntryPoint(t *testing.T) {
+	res, err := config.Load("")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NotNil(t, res)
+}
+
+func TestLoadWithContextNilContextUsesDefaultPolicy(t *testing.T) {
+	const (
+		scheme     = "mockloadnilcontextobstructed"
+		configData = "version: \"1.0\"\n"
+	)
+
+	blob.DefaultURLMux().RegisterBucket(scheme, &mockURLOpener{bucket: memblob.OpenBucket(nil)})
+
+	b, err := blob.OpenBucket(context.Background(), scheme+"://mybucket")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	t.Cleanup(func() { _ = b.Close() })
+
+	w, err := b.NewWriter(context.Background(), "config/local.yml", nil)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	_, err = w.Write([]byte(configData))
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NoError(t, w.Close())
+
+	res, err := config.Load(nil, scheme+"://mybucket/config/local.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NotNil(t, res)
+}
+
+func TestLoadWithContextTypedNilContextUsesDefaultPolicy(t *testing.T) {
+	const (
+		scheme     = "mockloadtypednilcontextobstructed"
+		configData = "version: \"1.0\"\n"
+	)
+
+	var openerReceivedNilLikeContext bool
+
+	blob.DefaultURLMux().RegisterBucket(scheme, &mockURLOpener{
+		bucket: memblob.OpenBucket(nil),
+		onOpen: func(ctx context.Context) {
+			openerReceivedNilLikeContext = isNilLikeContext(ctx)
+		},
+	})
+
+	b, err := blob.OpenBucket(context.Background(), scheme+"://mybucket")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	t.Cleanup(func() { _ = b.Close() })
+
+	w, err := b.NewWriter(context.Background(), "config/local.yml", nil)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	_, err = w.Write([]byte(configData))
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NoError(t, w.Close())
+
+	var typedNil context.Context = (*typedNilContext)(nil)
+	res, err := config.Load(typedNil, scheme+"://mybucket/config/local.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NotNil(t, res)
+	require.False(t, openerReceivedNilLikeContext, "expected typed-nil context to be normalized before source access")
+}
+
+func TestLoadAppliesDefaultTimeoutWhenContextHasNoDeadline(t *testing.T) {
+	const (
+		scheme     = "mockloadtimeoutobstructed"
+		configData = "version: \"1.0\"\n"
+	)
+
+	var (
+		openCtxDeadline time.Time
+		openCtxHasDL    bool
+	)
+
+	blob.DefaultURLMux().RegisterBucket(scheme, &mockURLOpener{
+		bucket: memblob.OpenBucket(nil),
+		onOpen: func(ctx context.Context) {
+			openCtxDeadline, openCtxHasDL = ctx.Deadline()
+		},
+	})
+
+	b, err := blob.OpenBucket(context.Background(), scheme+"://mybucket")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	t.Cleanup(func() { _ = b.Close() })
+
+	w, err := b.NewWriter(context.Background(), "config/local.yml", nil)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	_, err = w.Write([]byte(configData))
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NoError(t, w.Close())
+
+	start := time.Now()
+	res, err := config.Load(context.Background(), scheme+"://mybucket/config/local.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NotNil(t, res)
+	require.True(t, openCtxHasDL, "expected derived load context to have deadline")
+
+	remaining := time.Until(openCtxDeadline)
+	require.LessOrEqual(t, remaining, 11*time.Second)
+	require.Greater(t, remaining, 9*time.Second)
+	require.WithinDuration(t, start.Add(11*time.Second), openCtxDeadline, 2*time.Second)
+}
+
+func TestLoadReturnsContextErrorWhenDeadlineExceeded(t *testing.T) {
+	const (
+		scheme     = "mockloaddeadlineobstructed"
+		configData = "version: \"1.0\"\n"
+	)
+
+	blob.DefaultURLMux().RegisterBucket(scheme, &mockURLOpener{
+		bucket: memblob.OpenBucket(nil),
+		onOpen: func(ctx context.Context) {
+			time.Sleep(20 * time.Millisecond)
+		},
+	})
+
+	b, err := blob.OpenBucket(context.Background(), scheme+"://mybucket")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	t.Cleanup(func() { _ = b.Close() })
+
+	w, err := b.NewWriter(context.Background(), "config/local.yml", nil)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	_, err = w.Write([]byte(configData))
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NoError(t, w.Close())
+
+	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 5*time.Millisecond)
+	defer cancel()
+
+	res, err := config.Load(ctx, scheme+"://mybucket/config/local.yml")
+	require.Nil(t, res)
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, context.DeadlineExceeded)
+}
+
+func TestLoadReturnsContextErrorWhenCanceled(t *testing.T) {
+	const (
+		scheme     = "mockloadcanceledobstructed"
+		configData = "version: \"1.0\"\n"
+	)
+
+	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
+
+	blob.DefaultURLMux().RegisterBucket(scheme, &mockURLOpener{
+		bucket: memblob.OpenBucket(nil),
+		onOpen: func(_ context.Context) {
+			cancel()
+		},
+	})
+
+	b, err := blob.OpenBucket(context.Background(), scheme+"://mybucket")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	t.Cleanup(func() { _ = b.Close() })
+
+	w, err := b.NewWriter(context.Background(), "config/local.yml", nil)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	_, err = w.Write([]byte(configData))
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NoError(t, w.Close())
+
+	res, err := config.Load(ctx, scheme+"://mybucket/config/local.yml")
+	require.Nil(t, res)
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, context.Canceled)
+}
